productDisplayName: Alma Women Off White Printed Kurta
description: Style NotePared down to the basics, this kurta from alma is just right for a layered boho chic or a simple off-to-college vibe. Add a splash of colourful jewellery for an interesting dimension. The simple silhouette and the minimal design details will balance the brighter accessories. Product DetailsOff white printed kurta, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, a buttoned placket, three quarter sleeves with black piping at the cuff and split sidesMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine washWash dark colours separatelyDry in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
